productDisplayName: 2go Active Gear USA Men Lounge Set
description: Set of one t-shirt and one shortsSoft, absorbent, red inner t-shirt made of 100% premium combed cotton with Lycra used for the neck to prevent de-shaping, has a round high neck, short sleeves, print on the inner neck for tag-less comfort and signature branding on the left chest. Grey shorts made of 100% premium combed cotton, with an elasticated waist and drawstring, contrast panel stitch on the sides with branding on the left thigh, two pockets on the sides, print on the inner for tag-less comfort.Wash careMachine washDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron as neededIf you need a basic tee to keep you feeling fresh under your shirt and provide a little warmth when the air conditioning gets too cold then you've found it here. Comes with a pair of stylish yet comfy shorts. 2Go knows what they're doing when they come up with practical basics which will make you look and feel great.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
